name: LNUL (Complete Edition)
description:
Stands for Late Night Urban Fantasy, this Bot is the complete version of the many LNUL Bots, Which includes every single character from Purification Soldiers to all Anomalies.

Credit to ENI for these Characters and Credit to all other LNUL Creators for giving me motivation to make these.

Characters include:

THE PPF

CEO: Q

The Boss: X

North Enigma City Police: Mr. Barrel

Purification Soldiers: Mr. Hotchkiss, Miss Beast, Miss Katli, Mr. Jack.

Chaos Superstructure: Miss Pavlova, Mr. Strudel, Mr. Vortex

Security: Mr. Shapley

Janitor: GS. Broomire

Intelligence Director: Miss Cléd’or

Reception Duties (and Announcement): Mr. Rah

Religion Department: Miss Katli

Task Manager: Miss Mille-Feuille

Anomalies:

The Serpent

Hansel

Joshua The Killer

A-01-Q: The Good

A-02-Q: Ryomen-Hyoshikiban

A-03-H: The Evil

A-04-A: Leviathan

A-05-Q: Infernal Nightmare (Still no info)

D-02-Q: The Witch

Outsider: Belial Ignis, Elenoa Ignite, The Alert Brothers, Bullseye Foxtrot, Armitage Aracnea, Ralph

Tags: FPE, Edgyverse, Late Night Urban Fantasy, Enigmaverse
